raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tà fakka tas KUNGS
Zebnot: Raugi/ weena Mohziba
isees no weenas Tautas us oh-
tru/ un leela Wehtra taps us-
zelta no Semmes Sahneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Nokantee ta KUN-
GA gullehs tai Deena no weena
Semmes Galla lihds obtram/
tee ne taps schehsoti/ nedstapul-
zinati/ ned8 aprakti / tee buhs
par Suhdeem wirs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kauzeet juhs Gaanni/ un
brehzeet/ unn wahrtajtees Pelnd8
juhs Zeenigee ta gannama Pul-
ta/ jo juhtu Deenas irr peepil-
ditas/ ka nu buhs femmē kaut/
un juhsu Iskatfischanas irr klaht/
tad tafrittifeet juhs ka weens
dahrgs Traufs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Gaanni ne war-
rehs isbehgt / unn ta gannama
Pulka Zeenigee ne afstezzehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur buhs weena Breht-
schanas Balksne to Gannu/ unn
weena Raukschana to Zeentgo
ta gannama Pulka/ tadeht ka
tas KUNGS winno Gannbu
irr pohstijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta Meera Laidari
taps pohstit / ta KUNGA
Bahrskas Karstuma deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winsch irr ka janng Lau-
wa farvu Dshwokli atstabjis/ jo
winnu Semme irr par pohstu
Weetu tappusi tahs breefmigas
Dufmibas deht / unn winska
Bahrskas Karstuma labbad.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Efsch Eesahkuma ta
Waldischanas Jojo-
ma/ ta Dehla Josiju-
ta Kehnixa no Juhda/ noti-
schis Wahrd8 no ta KUNG-
tas fazziia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tà fakka tas KUNGS
Stahwi eefsch ta KUNG
Namma Pagalinja / unn run-
us witfeem Pilsfahteem Juh-
fas nahk peeluhtg eefsch ta KUNG-
GA Namma/ wihsus Wal-
dus/ ko es tew efmu paweh-
rurnnaht us teem/ ne atrauji
weenu Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jaschu tee klanfih8/
atgreestiees ikweens no tawa na
na Zelta/ tad ir man schehl bu-
tas Launums/ ko es teem da-
maju darriht / ta Launu-
winnu Darbu deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sakki tad uhs teem:
fakka tas KUNGS: Ja ju-
man ne klaustteet/ unn staiga-
mannā Bauslibā/ ko es jul-
Preekscha dewis efmu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka juhs klanfat te-
Wahrdeem manno Kalvu /
Praweeschu/ ko es allaschin-
iums tuhtn/ fur tomehr juhs-
efat klaustifschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad darrifchu es f-
Namnu itt ka Sihlu/ unn f-
Pilsfahtu liifchu es par wee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
